commands.review_summary:
The branch centralizes session-key/default resolution across Control UI, gateway, TUI, and session lifecycle code, adds startup metadata coverage, defers chat auth-status refresh, and adjusts GitHub Copilot thinking test types.

PR surface: Source -34, Tests +121. Total +87 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a PR performance/refactor review rather than a standalone bug report. The PR body provides after-fix web and TUI behavior proof for the changed startup path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer/author conflict resolution and revalidation on a protected, high-risk session-routing PR rather than an autonomous narrow code repair.

target.title: perf: streamline chat startup metadata
target.body:
## Summary

- Share UI session-key/default resolution helpers across chat, session controller, gateway state, and run lifecycle paths so startup hydration uses one alias-matching contract.
- Reuse the backend request-key matcher for TUI reset/session rows instead of re-parsing each row locally.
- Defer chat-tab model auth status refresh until after chat history/render scheduling, keep queued global sends unpinned until defaults are known, and add gateway metadata coverage for startup hydration without a follow-up sessions.list call.
- Align GitHub Copilot thinking compat types with the public provider context so broad prod/test type checks stay green.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/routing/session-key.test.ts src/tui/tui-session-actions.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-settings.refresh-active-tab.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/index.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=2 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 OPENCLAW_VITEST_SHARD_NAME=core-unit-ui OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_PARALLEL=2 pnpm exec node scripts/test-projects.mjs test/vitest/vitest.unit-ui.config.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/session-key.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.ts ui/src/ui/app-settings.ts src/routing/session-key.ts src/routing/session-key.test.ts src/tui/tui-session-actions.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/index.ts extensions/github-copilot/index.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:src`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `pnpm tsgo:prod`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm ui:build`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run -provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` - Testbox `tbx_01kt07pvvhq29wefaxz9sjjs5e`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26728269155
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings after the queued-global-send fix.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Faster startup after `/new` and `/reset` by keeping startup hydration on chat.history metadata and avoiding the extra sessions.list path in the web/TUI startup cases tested.

Real environment tested: Local gateway watch, authenticated Control UI in isolated Chrome, and local TUI in tmux against the same checkout/binary.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Built the Control UI, restarted gateway watch, opened `/chat?session=main` through browser automation, captured RPC methods/timings from the app event stream, then ran `pnpm tui` in tmux and exercised `/new` and `/reset`.

Evidence after fix: Web startup RPCs included `chat.history`, `models.list`, `commands.list`, and deferred `models.authStatus`; no `sessions.list` was observed. TUI `/new` switched locally without a gateway RPC, and `/reset` produced one `sessions.reset` RPC with no history/list follow-up.

Observed result after fix: In the measured run, web `chat.history` completed in 778ms; TUI `/reset` completed with one `sessions.reset` call in 605ms. The observed gateway-watch CPU profile still points at state DB/session store/plugin alias startup costs, not new work in this diff.

What was not tested: Full release packaging and cross-OS live UI proof.
target.author: steipete
